flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at William Jewell College rose 21% between 2006 and 2009 ($20.1k → $24.3k).

flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at William Jewell College are 27% above the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($59.3k vs $46.7k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at William Jewell College rose 19% between 2021 and 2024 (779 → 924).
